decks.notes: The deck primarily focuses on utilizing artifacts and cheap spells to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Cori-Steel Cutter are key creatures that can quickly generate value, while cards like Urza's Saga and Metallic Rebuke provide additional synergy with artifacts. The inclusion of Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student also helps with card advantage and filtering, allowing for more consistent plays. Overall, the deck aims to constantly apply pressure and outpace the opponent through efficient use of its resources.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's resources and tempo through counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage. It aims to stall the game until it can establish a dominant board presence with powerful creatures like Wan Shi Tong, Librarian and Solitude. The deck also utilizes different land destruction cards like Field of Ruin to disrupt the opponent's mana base. Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional control tools, while Consult the Star Charts and Brainsurge help dig for key cards. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent while building up its own resources for a decisive win.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly dropping aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to apply early pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Thraben Charm for additional support and removal options. The deck has a mana base that enables consistent early plays with lands like Sacred Foundry, Windswept Heath, and Arid Mesa. Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge provide additional reach and removal, while cards like Seasoned Pyromancer and Ranger-Captain of Eos offer card advantage and flexibility in different situations.

This deck revolves around discarding creatures with high mana costs to trigger the cascade mechanic and cast Living End, a powerful sorcery that returns all creatures from the graveyard to the battlefield. Violent Outburst and Shardless Agent help to cascade into Living End, while cards like Subtlety and Endurance provide disruption and protection. The deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures and then cast Living End to overwhelm the opponent with a board full of powerful creatures. Force of Negation and Street Wraith offer additional ways to cycle through the deck and protect the combo.

This deck focuses on aggressive creatures that can be blinked in and out of play to generate value and control the board. By utilizing cards like Ephemerate and Springleaf Drum, the deck can protect its creatures and maintain pressure on the opponent. With a mix of powerful creatures like Solitude and Starfield Shepherd, along with blink effects like Guide of Souls and Quantum Riddler, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly and efficiently. Additionally, cards like Consign to Memory and March of Otherworldly Light provide additional utility and flexibility in different game situations.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill your graveyard with creatures and then cast Living End to bring them all back onto the battlefield, overwhelming your opponent with a large number of creatures. The deck also includes cards like Violent Outburst and Generous Ent to help you cascade into Living End, as well as disruption tools like Force of Negation and Sink into Stupor to control the game until you can execute your combo. The key is to efficiently cycle through your deck and set up the perfect moment to unleash your Living End combo.

This Aggro-Affinity deck aims to flood the battlefield with cheap artifacts to power up cards like Urza's Saga and Mox Opal. By using cards like Claws of Gix and Weapons Manufacturing, the deck can quickly assemble a formidable board presence and overwhelm opponents with efficient creatures like Memnite and Pinnacle Emissary. With the addition of cards like Engineered Explosives and Shadowspear for removal and disruption, this deck is designed to maintain pressure and tempo throughout the game, while utilizing artifacts and synergies to maximize its effectiveness.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Emperor of Bones and Archon of Cruelty, and then reanimate them using cards like Persist and Unearth. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Spell Pierce to control the board and protect your combo pieces. The focus is on efficiently getting your key creatures onto the battlefield as fast as possible, overwhelming your opponent with strong threats.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly getting out creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, while using spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to control the board and deal direct damage to the opponent. Using cards like Mishra's Bauble for card advantage and Expressive Iteration for card selection, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and burn spells. The deck also includes cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Violent Urge for additional versatility and ways to push through damage.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to overwhelm the opponent while leveraging cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge for additional damage. The inclusion of cards like Voice of Victory and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provide additional ways to buff your creatures and push through damage. The deck also includes some disruption in the form of Thraben Charm and Static Prison to control the board and protect your creatures. Additionally, the deck includes some powerful finishers like Boromir, Warden of the Tower and Haliya, Guided by Light to seal the game.

The main concept of this Mono Black Aggro deck is to disrupt your opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize, Inquisition of Kozilek, and Nihil Spellbomb while applying early pressure with aggressive creatures like Nethergoyf and Emperor of Bones. Mishra's Bauble and Kozilek's Command provide card advantage and flexibility, while Fatal Push and Orcish Bowmasters help deal with opposing threats. The deck also utilizes the powerful land Urza's Saga to search for key artifacts like Shadowspear. Overall, the strategy focuses on combining disruption and aggression to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to ramp up quickly using Eldrazi creatures and control spells in order to overwhelm and dominate the opponent with powerful threats like Emrakul, the Promised End. The deck utilizes cards like Turntimber Symbiosis, Green Sun's Zenith, and Devourer of Destiny to accelerate mana production and get big creatures out early. Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command help clear the opponent's board while cards like Fanatic of Rhonas and Slumbering Trudge provide additional threats. Overall, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while deploying massive Eldrazi creatures to close out the game.

The deck revolves around denying the opponent resources and information through cards like Lantern of Insight, Codex Shredder, and Ensnaring Bridge, while controlling the game with disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Inquisition of Kozilek. It aims to lock the opponent out of the game by using cards like Torpor Orb and Grafdigger's Cage to shut down key strategies, while using Whir of Invention to tutor for essential pieces. The deck also utilizes cards like Narset, Parter of Veils and The Underworld Cookbook to generate advantage and maintain control over the game.

The main theme of this deck is to assemble the Allosaurus Combo by using cards like Neoform and Eldritch Evolution to quickly search for and play Allosaurus Rider. By combining it with Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant or Xenagos, God of Revels, the deck aims to create a powerful and unstoppable board presence. Additionally, the deck includes tools like Summoner's Pact and Pact of Negation to protect the combo and ensure its success. By efficiently ramping and searching for key pieces, the deck can execute its combo strategy with speed and consistency.

The deck focuses on utilizing creatures like Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker to generate +1/+1 counters with Blade of the Bloodchief, while also ramping into powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End. The deck uses cards like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of Urza's Saga and Vexing Bauble helps to tutor for key combo pieces and generate card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of powerful creatures and disruptive spells.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible using low-cost burn spells and efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Goblin Guide. The deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Searing Blaze while maintaining pressure with repetitive sources of damage like Rift Bolt and Lava Spike. By efficiently utilizing its mana base and powerful spells, the deck seeks to burn the opponent out before they can stabilize, leading to a fast and aggressive victory.
